name: property managers handling 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, inconsistent maintenance schedules cause tenant complaints. We send automated reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Inconsistent maintenance schedules lead to delayed repairs and tenant complaints.
